name: Thermaltake CTE T500 TG ARGB Snow E-ATX Full Tower Computer Case - Tempered Glass Panels - 3x Pre-installed 140mm CT140 ARGB White Fans - Dual 360mm Radiators Support - Removable Dust Filters - 2x USB 3.0 - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C (CA-1X8-00F6WN-01)

description: A full-tower E-ATX case with snow white ARGB fans and dual 360mm radiator support, designed for custom water cooling enthusiasts.
